input_context:
Global variable: g_activeSessionCount

[Declaration]
```cpp
static int g_activeSessionCount = 0;
```

[Written by]
  SessionManager::handleConnect: increments when a new client session is established
  SessionManager::handleDisconnect: decrements when a session is torn down

[Read by]
  StatsReporter::emitSessionStats: reports the current count to monitoring
  AdmissionControl::shouldAccept: rejects new sessions when the count exceeds the cap
ideal_output: Current number of active client sessions across the server, used for admission control and monitoring.
